name: Avatar Circles
visual_summary: Avatar Circles is a UI component that displays a collection of avatar images in a circular layout, possibly with a count of additional items. It is used when you want to showcase a list of people or items with profile images. It can be used for social media feeds, team listings, or other applications with profiles.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready card component with the following characteristics:

Name: Avatar Circles
Description: Avatar Circles is a UI component that displays a collection of avatar images in a circular layout, possibly with a count of additional items. It is used when you want to showcase a list of people or items with profile images. It can be used for social media feeds, team listings, or other applications with profiles.
Style: rounded, bordered, circular
Interactions: clickable, hover
Tags: avatar, profile, social media, team, listing

- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
